sections.paragraph:
ἐνδοξάζομαι 1 aor. pass. ἐνεδοξάσθην; fut. ἐνδοξασθήσομαι (s. δοξάζομαι, δόξα) to be held in high esteem, be glorified, honored (LXX; TestSim 6:5; PGM 13, 448 διά σε ἐνεδοξάσθη) of the name of the Lord Jesus 2 Th 1:12. ἐν τοῖς ἁγίοις αὐτοῦ among his holy ones vs. 10.—M-M. TW.

aor. aor. = aorist

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

fut. fut. = fut.

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestSim TestSim = Testament of Simeon, s. Test12Patr—List 2

PGM PGM = Papyri Graecae Magicae—List 4

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 332
